dominant_selected_markers: id4 x7, id2 x5, id2+id0 x4
root_cause: camera extrinsic is stable, but the dominant selected cube marker (id4 x7) is not the one that survives global checks (id2+id0 x4). This points to marker-to-marker cube model inconsistency.

dominant_selected_markers: id4 x10, id0 x4, id2 x4
root_cause: camera extrinsic is stable. Remaining failure comes from cube-model inconsistency, not from the board-based camera calibration itself.

root_cause: hand-eye is stable, but cube candidates disagree across markers. Selected poses are dominated by id0 x8, id4 x7, while accepted poses are only id0 x2, id0+id2 x1.
